data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a digital signature from the site supervisor in the report creation process. While the use case mentions that the site supervisor signs the report digitally, it does not provide concrete evidence of how this digital signature is implemented or verified. This lack of detail indicates a gap in the requirement coverage, as the specific mechanism for capturing and validating the digital signature is not addressed.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation or verification of the digital signature from the site supervisor.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify digital signature implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that the digital signature from the site supervisor is captured and can be validated.
